prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 、211、双一流综合类大学；软科2026年主榜第13名，近年排名稳定在前15；2025年声誉评价偏正面（学校管理回应积极）；2026年声誉偏负面（学术不端事件1 1起，含论文造假等），但抖音热度排名第29（较热），短视频曝光量较大，报考关注度不低；2022年曾出现多省断档，2023年投档线异常，2024-2025年有中关注度断档信号，历 史波动对报考心理有滞后影响；工商管理A+、生态学A+、临床医学A-、口腔医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、基础医学A、药学A等23 个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、电子信息/通信持续高热推荐；电气工程及其自动化高热推荐；法学分化观望；生化环材明显劝 退。本省2026年普通高考考生约20万人（较2025年总考生19.97万基本持平），物理类考生约14.36万，竞争格局稳定；中山大学位于广东广州，辽宁非本省，无显著地域偏好；该校在辽宁招生占比约2.5%-3.5%，属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合202 5年基准位次3250、2026年小幅扩招约4.5%（使位次数字增大）、本省物理类考生基本持平、声誉偏负面但抖音热度不低等因素；预测最低位次约3359名，区间2956–3762名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3728 → 3047 → 4141 → 3711 → 3250, with significant fluctuations in recent years. After dropping to 3711 in 2024, it rebounded to 3250 in 2025, moving forward by about 891 places over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is around 3250. Enrollment: 42 in 2021 → 63 in 2022 → 67 in 2023 → 67 in 2024 → 66 in 2025, with a planned 69 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 4.5% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked 13th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the top 15 in recent years. Reputation evaluation in 2025 was somewhat positive (responsive school management), but in 2026 it turned somewhat negative (11 academic misconduct incidents, including paper fraud). However, it ranks 29th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with significant short video exposure and considerable application attention. There were multi-province admission gaps in 2022, abnormal admission lines in 2023, and medium-attention gap signals in 2024-2025, with historical fluctuations having a lagging effect on application psychology. It has 23 A- or higher disciplines, including A+ in Business Administration and Ecology, A- in Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Computer Science and Technology, and A in Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Basic Medicine, and Pharmacy, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information/Communication remain highly recommended; Electrical Engineering and Automation is also highly recommended; Law is divided and under observation; Biology, Chemistry, Environmental Science, and Materials Science are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the province has about 200,000 regular college entrance exam takers (roughly flat compared to 2025's total of 199,700), with about 143,600 Physics Category candidates, maintaining a stable competitive landscape. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and Liaoning is not its home province, with no significant geographic preference. The university's enrollment share in Liaoning is about 2.5%-3.5%, at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3250, a slight enrollment expansion of about 4.5% in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), a roughly flat number of Physics Category candidates in the province, a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is about 3359, with a range of 2956 to 3762.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2956–3762, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<2956), you can focus on Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper bound (>3762), it is advisable to choose Tier 3 majors like Clinical Medicine (Guangzhou) as a safe choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 466 → 525 → 508 → 463 → 505, with small fluctuations in recent years. After rebounding to 463 in 2024, it fell back to 505 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 39 places, with a baseline of approximately 505 in 2025.
2. [Enrollment Plan] 2021: 20 students → 2022: 20 → 2023: 16 → 2024: 16 → 2025: 17, with a planned 15 students in 2026, a reduction of about 11.8% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked 13th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, stable in the top 15 in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2025 was somewhat positive; reputation in 2026 was somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident); Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot); experienced gaps in multiple provinces in 2022, abnormal admission scores in 2023, and medium-attention gap signals in 2024-2025; Business Administration A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Law A-, Sociology A-, Philosophy A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, Chinese History A-, etc., with outstanding humanities and social sciences strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law differentiation wait-and-see (somewhat hot), Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Teacher Training/Education differentiation wait-and-see. In 2026, the province has approximately 200,000 general college entrance exam candidates, with about 56,400 History Category candidates (slightly increased from 56,300 in 2025), slightly intensifying competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, Liaoning is not the home province, with no significant regional preference; the university's enrollment share in Liaoning is about 2.5%-3.5%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 505, a reduction of about 11.8% in enrollment in 2026 (which decreases the ranking number), a slight increase in History Category candidates in the province, and a somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 454, with a range of 400–508.
